title: BEM-850 route after 849
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:22 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem849_verify_after_bem848_tick.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='real_claude_response_found':
    status='next_process_response'
    next_action='parse real Claude response into agreed protocol'
elif ps=='queue_pending_no_response':
    status='next_fix_pending_queue'
    next_action='inspect remaining queue files and why processor did not consume them'
elif ps=='dispatch_and_runtime_seen_but_no_response':
    status='next_patch_response_writer'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher prompt/action to write CLAUDE RESPONSE file'
elif ps=='dispatch_seen_no_runtime_no_response':
    status='next_patch_runtime_state'
    next_action='patch target dispatcher runtime state writer or workflow target'
elif ps=='no_dispatch_no_runtime_no_response':
    status='next_fix_dispatch_processor'
    next_action='fix queue processor/result writer first'
else:
    status='next_diagnose_unknown'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-849 state '+ps
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_route_after_bem849.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_route_after_bem849.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Route After BEM-849 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem850_route_after_bem849.json','governance/reports/bem850_route_after_bem849.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-849 status to process response, fix pending queue, patch runtime, patch response writer, or repair dispatch processor')
